system_prompt: You are a CFD expert. Based on the user requirement and the retrieved similar cases, produce a concise usage guidance. If no suitable case is available, set match_level to 'none' and advise not to rely on similar case templates.
user_prompt:
User requirement:
do a Reynolds-Averaged Simulation (RAS) pitzdaily simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm. The domain is a 2D millimeter-scale channel geometry. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 15m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls. Use timestep of 0.0001 and output every 0.01. Finaltime is 0.3. use nu value of 1e-04.

Case info:
case name: pitzDaily
case domain: incompressible
case category: RAS
case solver: pimpleFoam

Selected similar case:
pitzDaily | incompressible | RAS | pimpleFoam | score=1.0866895081562689e-06

Top candidates:
- pitzDaily | incompressible | RAS | pimpleFoam | score=1.0866895081562689e-06
- pitzDailyLTS | incompressible | RAS | pimpleFoam | score=0.029155921190977097
- pitzDailyPulse | incompressible | laminar | pimpleFoam | score=0.1098441332578659
- pitzDaily | incompressible | LES | pisoFoam | score=0.1129085123538971
- pitzDaily | incompressible | None | simpleFoam | score=0.1418018788099289

Return JSON with keys: match_level (high/medium/low/none), use_scope, advice.
response: match_level='high' use_scope='Use the reference pitzDaily/incompressible/RAS/pimpleFoam case as the primary template for all files — system (controlDict, fvSchemes, fvSolution), constant (transportProperties, turbulenceProperties, polyMesh), and 0/ boundary condition files (U, p, turbulence fields).' advice='Directly adopt the reference pitzDaily RAS/pimpleFoam tutorial structure and modify controlDict for deltaT=0.0001, writeInterval=0.01, endTime=0.3; update 0/U inlet to fixedValue 15 m/s; ensure transportProperties sets nu to 1e-04; verify wall boundaries in 0/U and 0/p are set to no-slip and zeroGradient respectively.'
